title: delonix pumila
intro: Delonix pumila, also known as the dwarf or shrub-like variety of the Delonix regia tree, is a tropical plant species that is native to various parts of the world, including Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Delonix pumila include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin infections, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Delonix pumila typically involve infusing its leaves or roots in hot water to create a tea or decoction that can be used to treat various ailments.
